requirement_topic.en: EMC Radiated and Conducted Emissions — NOM-208-SCFI
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容辐射及传导发射——NOM-208-SCFI
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容輻射及傳導發射——NOM-208-SCFI

summary.en: NOM-208-SCFI (Norma Oficial Mexicana for wireless telecom terminals) sets electromagnetic compatibility (EMC) requirements including radiated and conducted emission limits for wireless telecom terminal equipment sold in Mexico. Compliance is administered by the Secretaria de Economia (SE) in coordination with IFT. Testing must be performed by an SE-accredited laboratory, and a conformity certificate is issued by an accredited Organismo de Certificacion (OC) such as ANCE or IMNC. The NOM-208-SCFI framework addresses spurious and harmonic emissions to protect other spectrum users and electronic equipment.
summary.zh: NOM-208-SCFI（无线电信终端设备墨西哥官方标准）为在墨西哥销售的无线电信终端设备规定了电磁兼容（EMC）要求，包括辐射和传导发射限值。合规由经济部（SE）会同IFT负责监督。测试须由SE认可实验室完成，合规证书由ANCE或IMNC等认可机构（OC）颁发。NOM-208-SCFI框架规范杂散和谐波发射，以保护其他频谱用户和电子设备。
summary.zht: NOM-208-SCFI（無線電信終端設備墨西哥官方標準）為在墨西哥銷售的無線電信終端設備規定了電磁相容（EMC）要求，包括輻射和傳導發射限值。合規由經濟部（SE）會同IFT負責監督。測試須由SE認可實驗室完成，合規證書由ANCE或IMNC等認可機構（OC）頒發。NOM-208-SCFI框架規範雜散和諧波發射，以保護其他頻譜用戶和電子設備。

standards_or_laws: NOM-208-SCFI — Equipos de Telecomunicaciones Inalambricos: EMC and RF requirements
Ley Federal sobre Metrologia y Normalizacion (LFMN) — NOM compliance obligation
ANCE / IMNC — accredited certification bodies for NOM-208-SCFI conformity

summary.en: In China, EMC for information technology and wireless equipment is primarily governed by GB/T 9254 (ITE radiated and conducted emission limits, aligned with CISPR 22) and GB/T 15153 series for telecom equipment. CCC certification incorporates EMC testing for applicable product categories. Testing is conducted by CNAS-accredited laboratories.
summary.zh: 在中国，信息技术及无线设备的EMC主要由GB/T 9254（IT设备辐射和传导发射限值，与CISPR 22对应）和GB/T 15153系列（电信设备）规范。CCC认证对适用产品类别包含EMC测试，测试由CNAS认可实验室完成。
summary.zht: 在中國，資訊技術及無線設備的EMC主要由GB/T 9254（IT設備輻射和傳導發射限值，與CISPR 22對應）和GB/T 15153系列（電信設備）規範。CCC認證對適用產品類別包含EMC測試，測試由CNAS認可實驗室完成。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254 — Information Technology Equipment EMC (aligned with CISPR 22)
CCC — China Compulsory Certification (incorporates EMC for applicable categories)

gap.en: Hard gap — GB/T 9254 and CCC EMC documentation are not recognised in Mexico. NOM-208-SCFI emission testing by an SE-accredited laboratory is independently required. Emission limit values and test configurations in NOM-208-SCFI may differ from GB/T 9254; re-testing against Mexican limits is mandatory.
gap.zh: 硬性差距——GB/T 9254和CCC EMC文件不被墨西哥承认。须由SE认可实验室独立完成NOM-208-SCFI发射测试。NOM-208-SCFI中的发射限值和测试配置可能与GB/T 9254不同，须针对墨西哥限值重新测试。
gap.zht: 硬性差距——GB/T 9254和CCC EMC文件不被墨西哥承認。須由SE認可實驗室獨立完成NOM-208-SCFI發射測試。NOM-208-SCFI中的發射限值和測試配置可能與GB/T 9254不同，須針對墨西哥限值重新測試。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] NOM-208-SCFI EMC conformance is mandatory for wireless telecom terminal equipment sold in Mexico. Chinese GB/T 9254 and CCC EMC reports are not accepted. Independent testing by an SE-accredited laboratory and certification by an accredited OC such as ANCE or IMNC is required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] NOM-208-SCFI EMC合规对在墨西哥销售的无线电信终端设备为强制要求。中国GB/T 9254和CCC EMC报告不被接受，须由SE认可实验室独立测试，并由ANCE或IMNC等认可机构出具合规证书。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] NOM-208-SCFI EMC合規對在墨西哥銷售的無線電信終端設備為強制要求。中國GB/T 9254和CCC EMC報告不被接受，須由SE認可實驗室獨立測試，並由ANCE或IMNC等認可機構出具合規證書。

requirement_topic.en: RF Spectrum Conformance and Transmit Power Limits — NOM-208-SCFI
requirement_topic.zh: 射频频谱合规及发射功率限值——NOM-208-SCFI
requirement_topic.zht: 射頻頻譜合規及發射功率限值——NOM-208-SCFI

summary.en: NOM-208-SCFI also specifies RF spectrum conformance requirements for wireless telecom terminal equipment, covering permitted operating frequency bands, maximum EIRP and transmit power limits, channel plans, and duty-cycle requirements. Mexico's ISM band allocations (2.4 GHz and 5 GHz) are broadly aligned with ITU Region 2 assignments, but specific EIRP ceilings and DFS channel requirements should be verified against current IFT frequency assignments. Devices must not transmit outside authorised bands. RF conformance testing is conducted alongside EMC testing under NOM-208-SCFI by an accredited laboratory.
summary.zh: NOM-208-SCFI还为无线电信终端设备规定了射频频谱合规要求，涵盖允许的工作频段、最大EIRP及发射功率限值、信道方案和占空比要求。墨西哥的ISM频段分配（2.4 GHz和5 GHz）与ITU第二区分配大体一致，但应根据IFT当前频率分配核验具体EIRP上限和DFS信道要求。设备不得在授权频段以外发射。射频合规测试与EMC测试一起由认可实验室依据NOM-208-SCFI进行。
summary.zht: NOM-208-SCFI還為無線電信終端設備規定了射頻頻譜合規要求，涵蓋允許的工作頻段、最大EIRP及發射功率限值、信道方案和佔空比要求。墨西哥的ISM頻段分配（2.4 GHz和5 GHz）與ITU第二區分配大體一致，但應根據IFT當前頻率分配核驗具體EIRP上限和DFS信道要求。設備不得在授權頻段以外發射。射頻合規測試與EMC測試一起由認可實驗室依據NOM-208-SCFI進行。

standards_or_laws: NOM-208-SCFI — RF spectrum conformance, EIRP and transmit power limits
IFT frequency allocation table — Mexico ISM band assignments (2.4 GHz / 5 GHz)
ITU Radio Regulations — Region 2 frequency assignments (reference basis)

summary.en: In China, RF spectrum conformance for Wi-Fi and Bluetooth is governed by SRRC type approval under MIIT, which covers operating frequency bands, EIRP limits, and channel plans under Chinese frequency allocation rules. China operates 2.4 GHz (channels 1-13) and 5 GHz ISM bands; specific allowed channels differ from some export markets. The CMIIT ID on the device evidences SRRC RF approval.
summary.zh: 在中国，Wi-Fi和蓝牙的射频频谱合规由MIIT颁发的SRRC型式认可管辖，涵盖中国频率分配规则下的工作频段、EIRP限值和信道方案。中国开放2.4 GHz（信道1-13）和5 GHz ISM频段；特定允许信道与部分出口市场不同。设备上的CMIIT ID证明通过了SRRC射频认可。
summary.zht: 在中國，Wi-Fi和藍牙的射頻頻譜合規由MIIT頒發的SRRC型式認可管轄，涵蓋中國頻率分配規則下的工作頻段、EIRP限值和信道方案。中國開放2.4 GHz（信道1-13）和5 GHz ISM頻段；特定允許信道與部分出口市場不同。設備上的CMIIT ID證明通過了SRRC射頻認可。

standards_or_laws: SRRC type approval — RF spectrum, EIRP, and channel plan under MIIT
China frequency allocation: 2.4 GHz channels 1-13, 5 GHz ISM sub-bands

gap.en: Hard gap — SRRC RF approval is not recognised in Mexico. NOM-208-SCFI RF testing is independently required. Mexico's 5 GHz channel plan and DFS requirements may differ from China domestic settings; firmware may need reconfiguration to disable channels not permitted by IFT. EIRP limits should be verified against current IFT allocations rather than assumed identical to FCC or ETSI limits.
gap.zh: 硬性差距——SRRC射频认可不被墨西哥承认，须独立完成NOM-208-SCFI射频测试。墨西哥5 GHz信道方案和DFS要求可能与中国国内设置不同，固件可能需要重新配置以禁用IFT不允许的信道。EIRP限值应根据IFT当前分配核验，不应假定与FCC或ETSI限值相同。
gap.zht: 硬性差距——SRRC射頻認可不被墨西哥承認，須獨立完成NOM-208-SCFI射頻測試。墨西哥5 GHz信道方案和DFS要求可能與中國國內設置不同，固件可能需要重新配置以禁用IFT不允許的信道。EIRP限值應根據IFT當前分配核驗，不應假定與FCC或ETSI限值相同。

source.publisher: Instituto Federal de Telecomunicaciones (IFT) — Espectro Radioelectrico

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] RF spectrum conformance under NOM-208-SCFI is mandatory for wireless telecom terminal equipment in Mexico. Chinese SRRC RF approval is not recognised. Independent NOM-208-SCFI RF testing is required; 5 GHz channel and DFS settings should be verified against IFT frequency allocations before testing.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] NOM-208-SCFI射频频谱合规对墨西哥境内的无线电信终端设备为强制要求。中国SRRC射频认可不被承认，须独立完成NOM-208-SCFI射频测试；测试前应根据IFT频率分配核验5 GHz信道和DFS设置。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] NOM-208-SCFI射頻頻譜合規對墨西哥境內的無線電信終端設備為強制要求。中國SRRC射頻認可不被承認，須獨立完成NOM-208-SCFI射頻測試；測試前應根據IFT頻率分配核驗5 GHz信道和DFS設置。
